Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an [x] (no spaces) -->

- [ ] 🎉 feat: New feature
- [ ] 🐛 fix: Bug fix
- [ ] 📝 docs: Documentation update
- [ ] 💄 style: Code style/formatting (no logic change)
- [ ] ♻️ refactor: Code refactoring (no functionality change)
- [ ] ⚡ perf: Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ test: Test addition or update
- [ ] 🔧 chore: Maintenance, dependencies, tooling
- [ ] 🚀 ci: CI/CD changes
- [ ] 📦 build: Build system changes
- [ ] 🚑 hotfix: Critical production fix

## Services Affected
<!-- Mark all that apply with an [x] (no spaces) -->

- [ ] 🔐 auth - Authentication service
- [ ] 📍 location - Location tracking service
- [ ] 💳 payment-rating - Payment and rating service
- [ ] 🚗 trip-manager - Trip management service
- [ ] 🌐 web - Web frontend
- [ ] 📦 other: _____

## Checklist
<!-- Ensure your PR meets all requirements. Mark completed items with [x] -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] I have checked for potential breaking changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes are merged and published
- [ ] I have rebased my branch on the latest main
- [ ] My commits follow the conventional commits format

### Reminder
- Keep PRs focused and small when possible
- Split unrelated changes into separate PRs
